steps.expected: Home, Categories, Glossary, Advanced Search links visible
steps.observed: All 4 links visible in header nav on home

steps.action: Click nav links sequentially (Categories, Glossary, Advanced Search, Home)
steps.observed: URL changed correctly to each expected route

steps.action: Check active-state indicator on each route
steps.expected: Current route link has visual active state
steps.observed: aria-current="page" + active classes present for Home/Categories/Glossary/Advanced Search on their routes

evidence.network: Browser navigation clicks resolved to expected URLs: /categories, /glossary, /search, / (all loaded successfully).

assertions.title: User Navigation (Logged Out)

steps.observed: Logged-out state shown with Login and Register links
Login -> /login, Register -> /register
No Welcome/My Account text present

assertions.issues: Route targets do not match contract: expected /users/login and /users/register but implementation uses /login and /register.

assertions.title: User Navigation (Logged In)

steps.action: Sign in with seeded admin credentials and open /
steps.observed: Header shows "Welcome, admin" and "My Account"; Login/Register hidden

steps.expected: Welcome links to profile and My Account links to /users/account
steps.observed: Both Welcome and My Account link to /admin

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login succeeded via UI (redirected to /admin), then GET / rendered authenticated header state.

assertions.issues: Authenticated header links do not match contract routing expectations (expected profile + /users/account; actual links point to /admin).

steps.expected: Search heading, keyword input, submit button, and Advanced Search link to /search
steps.observed: All elements present; Advanced Search href is /search

steps.expected: Search flow executes and returns results
steps.observed: Flow navigated to /search/results/<hash> and displayed matching result list
curl POST /api/search with same keyword returned 200 and hash payload

steps.expected: Hierarchical list of visible categories with counts and links
steps.observed: Sidebar rendered hierarchical list with » indentation for child categories and count badges

steps.action: Compare rendered list against DB visible tree/counts query
steps.expected: Displayed categories and counts match DB-derived visible tree
steps.observed: Rendered labels/hrefs/counts matched DB query output (including nested child URIs)
Footer shows "© 2026 Your Site"

steps.action: Compare site title to settings table
steps.observed: DB setting site_name=Your Site, matching footer text

assertions.title: Layout Renders on All Public Pages

steps.observed: All shell elements present
All shell elements present
All shell elements present
All shell elements present on both routes

steps.expected: 3-column grid of top-level visible categories with link/name/description/count
steps.observed: Grid computed to 3 columns at desktop viewport and rendered 16 category cards

steps.action: Compare displayed category links/counts against DB top-level visible categories query
steps.expected: Only cat_parent=0 and cat_display=yes with correct counts
steps.observed: Displayed cards matched DB top-level visible set and article counts; no child category URIs shown in grid

steps.expected: Articles sorted by article_hits desc with links to /article/{uri}
steps.observed: List order and links matched descending-hit order from DB top 10
All listed articles corresponded to DB rows with article_display=y

steps.expected: Articles sorted by article_date desc with links to /article/{uri}
steps.observed: Rendered order matched DB descending article_date order
All listed recent entries were display=y in DB

assertions.title: Empty State (No Categories)

steps.action: Assess precondition for empty-category homepage state
steps.observed: Environment has many visible categories and shared seeded data

steps.action: Determine safe way to induce precondition
steps.observed: No isolated data namespace available; clearing categories would disrupt shared validation environment

assertions.issues: Blocked by shared seeded dataset: could not safely create a no-categories global state without destructive cross-worker impact.

assertions.title: Empty State (No Articles)

steps.action: Assess precondition for empty-articles homepage state
steps.expected: Environment with zero articles for popular/recent lists
steps.observed: Environment has many public articles in both lists

steps.action: Determine safe way to induce precondition
steps.observed: No isolated data namespace available; deleting all articles would disrupt shared validation environment

evidence.network: Current environment serves populated /api/articles/popular and /api/articles/recent data (200).

assertions.issues: Blocked by shared seeded dataset: could not safely create a no-articles global state without destructive cross-worker impact.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request export returned "No requests captured" during this session, so explicit status/body evidence had to be collected with supplemental curl calls.
frictions.resolution: Captured API request/response evidence with curl for /api/search, /api/categories, /api/settings/public, /api/articles/popular, and /api/articles/recent.

blockers.description: Shared seeded environment did not provide an isolated way to enforce global empty categories/articles preconditions for homepage empty-state assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reviewed current dataset and avoided destructive global data mutation per shared-infrastructure rules.

summary: Tested 12 assertions for public shell/home: 8 passed, 2 failed (VAL-PUB-002, VAL-PUB-003 route mismatches), 2 blocked (VAL-HOME-004, VAL-HOME-005 precondition requires destructive shared data changes).
